productionGoal: Create the first production-usable tactical animation asset set for Aetherlan War.
deliverables: transparent-background skill effect frames when needed

prompts.prompt: full body hero, A-pose, front view, transparent or plain background, same face, same armor, same sword, consistent proportions
subtle breathing idle loop, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
side-facing tactical run cycle, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
brief recoil hit reaction, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
falling defeat sequence, fantasy warrior, same costume, transparent background
bright sword slash arc, alpha background, fantasy hit effect

acceptanceChecklist: map sheet reaches full 4x4 target or approved equivalent
pipeline audit has no action overflow errors
